# COME AS YOU WERE full synopsis
COME AS YOU WERE is a six-part fictionalized prestige thriller inspired by the cultural mythology around Kurt Cobain and Nirvana. The project uses the Rome overdose, the rehab escape, the missing days, the widow, the investigator, the note, the estate, the handlers, and the public narrative war as dramatic ignition.
The show is built for producers, financiers, managers, attorneys, showrunners, banners, and packaging partners.
